productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Stripes Grey Socks
description: With a supportive Fit and crafted from 73% cotton, 25% nylon and 2% elastane, these socks from United Colours Of Benetton make for a great buy. With the tonal stripes and the elasticated and ribbed blue cuff, what better way to enhance your comfort level three-fold than with this stylish pair of socks in black and grey! Made from a cotton/nylon/elastane blend for a secure, enhanced grip and exemplary comfort Arch support for a customised fit Breathable sole with softly elasticated broad ribbed cuff to ensure a soft grip Brand name printed below the ribbed cuff Sock care Machine wash in warm water below 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach or tumble dry Cool iron
